scripts.dev:api: cd apps/api && uv run fastapi dev src/pixelaid_api/main.py
scripts.dev:voice: cd apps/voice-agent && uv run pixelaid-voice-agent dev
scripts.contracts:export: cd apps/api && uv run python -m pixelaid_api.openapi ../../packages/contracts/openapi.json
scripts.contracts:generate: bun run contracts:export && bunx openapi-typescript packages/contracts/openapi.json -o packages/contracts/src/schema.d.ts
scripts.db:types: bunx supabase --workdir packages/db gen types typescript --project-id "${SUPABASE_PROJECT_REF:-djjwforazkkzuexqflqn}" --schema public > packages/db/database.types.ts
scripts.lint: cd apps/web && bun run lint && cd ../../apps/api && uv run ruff check . && cd ../../apps/voice-agent && uv run ruff check .
scripts.typecheck: cd apps/web && bun run typecheck && cd ../../packages/contracts && bun run typecheck && cd ../../apps/api && uv run pyright && cd ../../apps/voice-agent && uv run pyright
scripts.test: cd apps/api && uv run pytest && cd ../../apps/voice-agent && uv run pytest
